prompt: Please check my draft spec at test-fixtures/enforce/spec.md against the termbase at test-fixtures/termbase.csv and tell me where it drifts from the approved terminology. Save your report as findings.md.
assertions: Both occurrences of 'extension mode' flagged with canonical replacement 'extend mode', with line numbers 5 and 14

'proposal draft' is NOT flagged (its term has status candidate, not approved)
